title: The Truth About Space Mirrors!

scenes.text: NASA's space mirror could change our nights forever!
Many believe a space mirror will dangerously intensify light on Earth.
scenes.label: Dangerous Light Intensity

scenes.text: In reality, these mirrors will reflect light safely and efficiently.
scenes.label: Safe Light Reflection

scenes.text: Follow if curiosity runs your brain.

description: Explore the myth and truth about space mirrors and their impact on Earth. Follow for daily science!
